creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Cheffo Thank you. Please set maintainer-approval flag to + on attachments for ports you are maintainer of.

Also note that QA results (portlint, poudriere) are no longer required as attachments. Just mention they pass in your comment/description like:

- portlint: OK (looks fine.)
- porttest: OK (poudriere: <versions>, <archs>, <options> tested)
